subcodes.first_line: O ye real friends and beloved maidservants of God! Your letter, through the maidservant of God, Dr. Clock
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی و کنیزان عزیزان الهی نامه ای که بواسطه امه الله دکتور کلوک
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @saddening another soul, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
